comment.body:
Well tbh , trading is hard , doesnt mean it doesnt work, the thing is ppls cant stay low size, because greed always take over, when i meant probabilities i really mean it, i mixed positioning+probabilities trades, example , today QQQ gap down has  73% to
Fill + mixing that with upside pivot was a nice trade till 6670 , even if from the other side i had a 5 mins orb range with 71% to double break i still went long as i had 2 confluence, if u dont have a system, it will always will be random, when i get stop, i stop because i dont have just more setup , even if i want try again , i got max 2 trade for day and they need be aling with positioning+probabilities
